## Prescription text

Generic prescription text using placeholders only: `<ds-package>`, `<docs-url>`. The line below seeds a deny-listed DS-distinctive component name; the lexical deny-list check must catch it and name this file, the line, and the term.

When the slate includes an empty-state component, model it on Blankslate from the upstream library.
